title: Habenaria tenuior
taxonomy: Habenaria tenuior is a species within the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and genetic makeup. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, with over 30,000 species. Within this family, Habenaria tenuior is classified as a type of terrestrial orchid. Further classification places it within the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Orchideae.
